contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: dao_protocol PR3: sheets adapter base + newsletter/email-agent tracking endpoints (Python)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/35
  
  Details:
  PR3 of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction. Built the first server/sheets/ adapter (service-account Google Sheets v4 client + read/update helpers, reusing Edgar's existing key on seni_ror_new so no new credential) and ported Gdrive::NewsletterEmails and Gdrive::EmailAgentDrafts (idempotent open/click recording, recipient-match guard, never-raise). Ported the 4 tracking endpoints (newsletter + email-agent open/click): 302 redirects (open to logo, click to decoded target or fallback), base64url decode, http(s)-only safe-redirect, no-cache headers, best-effort sheet writes that never break the redirect. 7 mocked unit tests (12 total) pass. Deployed to seni_ror_new:8010; verified all four redirects via the /dao-protocol test prefix; confirmed google libs installed and the SA key readable. Gate off: real /newsletter and /email_agent still served by Rails. Tracker + cutover test plan updated.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
